title: Corporate Secretary/Accounts Executive (F&B Group)
description:
Job Description

We are a Singapore-based food and beverage (F&B) holding company operating multiple outlets in the East Coast / Katong area. The group operates through several legal entities under a central holding structure.

We are seeking a reliable and well-organised professional to support the group’s accounting, corporate secretarial coordination, and administrative functions in a sole contributor role, working closely with the directors and external service providers.

This position is suited for someone who is comfortable handling day-to-day execution, coordination, and administration in a lean F&B environment.

Key Responsibilities

Corporate Secretarial & Compliance

  • Coordinate corporate secretarial matters for the holding company and its subsidiaries

  • Prepare and maintain resolutions, minutes, and statutory records

  • Track and manage ACRA compliance, filings, and statutory deadlines

  • Liaise with external corporate secretarial firms, auditors, tax agents, and legal advisors

  • Maintain corporate documents, licenses, leases, and compliance records

Accounting & Finance (F&B Operations)

  • Maintain or assist in maintaining full sets of accounts for multiple F&B outlets

  • Consolidate outlet-level data for monthly management accounts and profit & loss (P&L) reports

  • Perform daily sales reconciliation, bank reconciliations, and expense tracking

  • Handle invoicing, payments, and intercompany charges

  • Coordinate GST reporting, audits, and tax filings with external accountants

Administration & HR Support

  • Provide general administrative support to directors and management

  • Manage leases, supplier contracts, service agreements, and insurance documentation

  • Coordinate with landlords, banks, suppliers, and POS system vendors

  • Handle HR administration including payroll coordination, CPF submissions, leave tracking, and onboarding documents

  • Support outlet openings, renewals, and closures from an administrative perspective

  • Handle ad hoc administrative and operational matters typical of an F&B group

Job Requirements

  • Diploma or Degree in Accounting, Business, Finance, or a related field

  • At least 3–5 years of relevant experience in accounting, administrative, or corporate secretarial coordination roles

  • Experience in F&B, retail, hospitality, or multi-outlet operations preferred

  • Familiar with Singapore statutory compliance, ACRA, and GST

  • Comfortable working independently in a sole contributor role

  • Strong organisational skills with high attention to detail

  • Able to handle confidential information with discretion and professionalism

  • Proficient in Microsoft Excel and accounting software

Additional Information

  • Position Type: Full-time

  • Work Location: East Coast / Katong, Singapore

  • Working Arrangement: On-site

  • Salary Range: SGD 3,500 – 4,500 per month (commensurate with experience)

Application Instructions

Interested candidates are invited to apply with their resume and a brief summary of their relevant experience. Please note that this job is available for Singaporeans and Permanent Residents Only

postedCompany.description:
PANEVINO ("bread and wine") is a company that is dedicated to delivering handmade food from traditional recipes using quality ingredients. 


Cugini Trattoria Pizzeria, which launched in early 2009 is our main restaurant. We serve authentic Italian food and excel in customer satisfaction.
